reviews.review_description: Im a consistent player of Totally Baseball, however this game caught my eye and I have tried it out. I didn't realize they had multiplayer, but definitely going to try it. I love how the graphic style over Totally Baseball. Hopefully the devs can pull off a better version of TB, as this will be my go to for baseball if that happens. But as it sits, this seems like it can be great.

It’s a great game, but here are some ideas to add:
1. Showing how far your home runs are
2. Fielding modes
3. Different stadium options

reviews.review_title: When are you going to finish the game
reviews.review_description:
Pretty plain. Hour or two and your wanting a little more. Keep trying and you might have something.

Update:
Been playing a little more often and I am upgrading 1 more star. It's good but has bugs. I'm a lefty and it constantly puts me right on top of the plate. Batter movement would be huge. Also, maybe it's me, but the pointer will not go to the lower half of the menu in batting practice mode ( speed, tempo, strike zone) without a big hassle. Throwing the ball is next to impossible. Fix those things and you have 4 stars.  For 5 stars dress it up a bit. Put people in the seats, different stadiums, some eye candy to keep it fresh.  
J.M..2$

developer_response.body:
Hello. Unfortunately rating 2/5 is not helping us to fuel the game :( It will sink.
Every rating makes more players coming - more feedback - more fuel for the game. Please - If you could consider to leave some advice - join us on www.godsofthepump.com

and leave us 5/5 here and we will make sure to keep upgrading the game here <3

We are more than happy to fix all your issues in exchange for better rate - as it boost our development immensely! The better the rates - the more we can invest in the game.

www.godsofthepump.com (Link to discord on the page)
I have a feeling that the crashes may occur on unstable connection multiplayer runs. We will dig into that 🙌🫰

reviews.review_description: Very unrealistic to hit with the controllers.  Can you hit  without the controllers? I will change review if someone can explain

developer_response.body:
Hey! Totally get what you mean - but sadly, hitting without controllers is not really possible right now.

Hand tracking on Quest is great for slower stuff (menus, simple gestures), but a baseball swing is super fast. The cameras and tracking just cannot reliably follow that speed, so your hands would lose tracking, jitter, or the bat would lag/teleport. That would feel way more unrealistic than using controllers.

So for hitting we use controllers because they are tracked much more accurately and can keep up with quick swings.

If you want, join our Discord from here: www.godsofthepump.com - we discuss things there and actively work on player feedback.

Hello Breman! Let us know if you can change your rating - it would help us a lot to show up on the charts and work on the game more <3

Hey. No one before reported "ball goes too low" :O Could you please check you meta boundaries setup.

We invite you to our discord
www.godsofthepump.com
Where we would love to hear you out and go deeper with all your fixes and ideas.
Changing the review can boost the development!

reviews.review_description: When I first got the game, I was hardly hitting it more than 250 ft. I figured it was impossible to hit home runs unless Aaron Judge is playing it. But with the rapid pace, it really helps with your swinging mechanics. I started using my hips to generate power and suddenly I was smashing home runs. Unlike other games, where mechanics doesn’t really matter, this one it does. So get it while it’s free because multiplayer is coming out soon
